news.title:
Poly Medicure Ltd schedules an investor/analyst call on 30th March 2026 at 3:30 PM.
Meeting will be virtual; no unpublished price-sensitive information to be disclosed.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure Ltd schedules an investor/analyst call on 30th March 2026 at 3:30 PM.
Meeting will be virtual; no unpublished price-sensitive information to be disclosed.

news.title:
Poly Medicure shared investor presentation on 7 March 2026, highlighting 15 plants across 5 countries.
The company has 225 medical devices, presence in 125 countries, and 100 products in R&D pipeline.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure shared investor presentation on 7 March 2026, highlighting 15 plants across 5 countries.
The company has 225 medical devices, presence in 125 countries, and 100 products in R&D pipeline.

news.title:
Poly Medicure Ltd released an updated investor presentation under Regulation 30 LODR, highlighting key growth strategies and expansion plans.
The company reported 9.1% YoY consolidated revenue growth for 9M FY26, driven by domestic and international sales growth.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure Ltd released an updated investor presentation under Regulation 30 LODR, highlighting key growth strategies and expansion plans.
The company reported 9.1% YoY consolidated revenue growth for 9M FY26, driven by domestic and international sales growth.

news.title: Poly Medicure reports mixed Q3 results; expects 25-28% growth in renal business.
news.summary: Poly Medicure reports mixed Q3 results; expects 25-28% growth in renal business.

news.title:
India agrees to ease entry for US devices under interim trade deal.
Domestic industry urges reciprocity to balance trade and growth.
news.summary:
India agrees to ease entry for US devices under interim trade deal.
Domestic industry urges reciprocity to balance trade and growth.

news.title: Poly Medicure Ltd targets 25% domestic growth by FY27 through strategic acquisitions and capacity expansion.
news.summary: Poly Medicure Ltd targets 25% domestic growth by FY27 through strategic acquisitions and capacity expansion.

news.title:
Poly Medicure Ltd shared the audio recording of its Q3 FY25 earnings call.
Recording available on the company's website as per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure Ltd shared the audio recording of its Q3 FY25 earnings call.
Recording available on the company's website as per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
Poly Medicure's Q3 EBITDA decreased to ₹1.11B from ₹1.15B YoY.
EBITDA margin dropped to 22.5% from 27% YoY.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure's Q3 EBITDA decreased to ₹1.11B from ₹1.15B YoY.
EBITDA margin dropped to 22.5% from 27% YoY.

news.title:
Poly Medicure Ltd's Dec 2025 quarterly sales hit a record 493.66 crores.
Despite high sales, profitability metrics declined, indicating margin challenges.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure Ltd's Dec 2025 quarterly sales hit a record 493.66 crores.
Despite high sales, profitability metrics declined, indicating margin challenges.

news.title:
Poly Medicure's stock fell 44% due to moderated revenue growth (5.3% in H1 FY26) and valuation concerns, despite strong profitability.
Strategic acquisitions, India-EU trade deal, and ongoing investments position Poly Medicure for future growth and recovery.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure's stock fell 44% due to moderated revenue growth (5.3% in H1 FY26) and valuation concerns, despite strong profitability.
Strategic acquisitions, India-EU trade deal, and ongoing investments position Poly Medicure for future growth and recovery.

news.title:
Poly Medicure's board meeting on 5th Feb 2026 will review unaudited Q3 & 9M FY25-26 results.
Trading window for Poly Medicure will remain closed till 7th Feb 2026 as per prior notice.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure's board meeting on 5th Feb 2026 will review unaudited Q3 & 9M FY25-26 results.
Trading window for Poly Medicure will remain closed till 7th Feb 2026 as per prior notice.

news.title:
Capital Group sold a 1.8% stake in Poly Medicure for Rs 302 cr.
Shares of Poly Medicure fell 1.49% on NSE, closing at Rs 1,642.
news.summary:
Capital Group sold a 1.8% stake in Poly Medicure for Rs 302 cr.
Shares of Poly Medicure fell 1.49% on NSE, closing at Rs 1,642.

news.title:
Poly Medicure saw a block trade of Rs. 157.2 crores on NSE.
953,661 shares were traded at Rs. 1648.2 per share.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure saw a block trade of Rs. 157.2 crores on NSE.
953,661 shares were traded at Rs. 1648.2 per share.

news.title:
Poly Medicure expects a second-half rebound, targeting export recovery and product expansion by FY27.
The company has a strong cash position of ₹750 crore, enabling small acquisitions in FY27.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure expects a second-half rebound, targeting export recovery and product expansion by FY27.
The company has a strong cash position of ₹750 crore, enabling small acquisitions in FY27.

news.title:
Govt rolls back QCOs on key inputs, easing sourcing for med device makers.
Industry flagged sourcing issues for primary, intermediate materials in production.
news.summary:
Govt rolls back QCOs on key inputs, easing sourcing for med device makers.
Industry flagged sourcing issues for primary, intermediate materials in production.

news.title: Poly Medicure Ltd targets 15-16% revenue growth by FY26 via domestic and global expansion.
news.summary: Poly Medicure Ltd targets 15-16% revenue growth by FY26 via domestic and global expansion.

news.title:
Poly Medicure Q2 net profit rose to ₹918.3M from ₹874.5M YoY.
Revenue increased to ₹4.44B, but EBITDA margin fell to 25.8% from 27.4% YoY.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure Q2 net profit rose to ₹918.3M from ₹874.5M YoY.
Revenue increased to ₹4.44B, but EBITDA margin fell to 25.8% from 27.4% YoY.

news.title:
Poly Medicure approved Q2, H1 FY26 results; acquired 90% rights in Pendra Care.
Board approved Himalayan Mineral Water acquisition plan; ESOP shares allotted in Q2.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure approved Q2, H1 FY26 results; acquired 90% rights in Pendra Care.
Board approved Himalayan Mineral Water acquisition plan; ESOP shares allotted in Q2.

news.title:
Poly Medicure Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ended Sep 30, 2025.
Results comply with SEBI LODR regulations; consolidated financials include subsidiaries/associates.
news.summary:
Poly Medicure Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ended Sep 30, 2025.
Results comply with SEBI LODR regulations; consolidated financials include subsidiaries/associates.
